title: 菊花賞の後に・生来の強運

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Phew... It looks like I beat you to the finish line,
Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I did it for McQueen, who guided me with such
kindness, and for the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Gwaaaah! I can't believe this! To think my luck
would run out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright ran spectacularly, managing to beat
Matikanefukukitaru, who had become a
formidable opponent.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But I did lose... No, wait a moment...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I may have lost the race, but luck has not been
lost! No! This was a victory for luck, after all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: A victory for luck? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to explain! You, Bright, were born into
the Mejiro family and blessed with relatives like
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Since the moment you were born, luck has always been by your side! How's someone supposed to compete with that?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I see. I suppose you could think of it that way.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! That is why you must fully appreciate
your lucky circumstance. ☆

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: As for this race, congrats! Well done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru gives Mejiro Bright a warm
congratulations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm so pleased. Because of you, I was able
to carve the Mejiro name into the turf at Kyoto.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Also, long-distance races are such a joy. They're
quite different from medium-lengths. I'm excited
to try another.
choice_data_list: Yeah. You did a great job today.
Yeah. You did a great job today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I praise her performance, we also begin
discussing our next steps now that we know she
can run 3,000-meter races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She could continue to focus on long-distance or
improve her craft by returning to medium.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I want what the Mejiro family wants.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
So I will not waver. The Mejiro path leads next to
the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess Mejiro Bright sees the path ahead of her
clear as day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First was the Kikuka Sho, and now the spring
Tenno Sho... but does it really lead to a top
senior-year G1 long-distance race?

If you cannot make up your mind quite yet, why
don't you perform a test first?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, McQueen, Ryan! You're both here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan and I have been discussing where we think
your true affinity lies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, there is an upcoming race ideal for
assessing your potential as a stayer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An ideal race? She must be talking about...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. At 3,600 meters, it is the longest race
in the country. Further, it is a mixed G2 race that
includes senior year Umamusume. If you can
secure a victory there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There will be no reason to doubt your abilities as
a stayer. Right, Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I think it's better not to ignore Bright's
potential.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, what do you say to that idea, Trainer? Do
you agree?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. It's quiiite a long one, right? I'm
excited just thinking about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Stayers Stakes—with its unparalleled length,
it's a clear standout of the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think there we'll find our answer to the mystery
of Mejiro Bright's true talents.
